steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: Grant and colleagues took sterilized (lifeless) soil pots and added ‘slurries of live microbes’ to them. The blank describes the physical action they performed on the pots — they stocked them with living organisms.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "precluded": means prevented. You cannot preclude a pot, and the team was adding microbes, not blocking them. ✗
  • "estimated": means made an approximate calculation. The team was performing a physical action on pots, not doing math. ✗
  • "sanitized": means cleaned to remove microbes. The soil was already sterilized — adding live microbes is the opposite of sanitizing. ✗
  • "populated": means filled with living inhabitants. Substituting: ‘populated pots of sterilized soil with slurries of live microbes’ — they stocked empty soil with organisms to run the experiment. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
